text.title: PM Tool Selection Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (active_users, budget_band, current_tool_satisfaction) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Active PM users ≥ 10 AND tooling budget ≥ 3k/yr?

conclusion.verdict: stay with current tool; refactor configuration
too small — task-app or shared spreadsheet suffices

text.example: active_users=25 → budget_yr=8000 → current_tool_satisfaction=0.6 → apply full tool-selection (rule five-dimension-scorecard).
